docs.title: Built For the CSR2 Enthusiast
docs.text:
Welcome to the official Kustomz Mod Shop website.

Kustomz Mod Shop provides premium mod services for CSR2 through a professional, organized, and customer-focused experience.

This website is the official source for information about our services, customer portal, bot, and legal policies.

docs.title: 🏎️ Mod Services
docs.text:
Kustomz Mod Shop is dedicated to delivering premium mod services for the CSR2 community.

Our commitment is to provide a professional experience built on consistency, organization, and trust.

docs.title: 🎫 Official Customer Portal
docs.text:
Our official Discord server serves as the Kustomz Mod Shop customer portal.

Customers can:

  • Open private service tickets
  • Communicate directly with staff
  • Receive updates regarding active requests
  • Stay informed through announcements and community channels

Join the Official Kustomz Mod Shop Discord Server

docs.title: 🤖 Kustomz Bot
docs.text: The Kustomz Bot helps maintain the customer portal through ticket automation, server management, and community management.

docs.title: ⚖️ Legal
docs.text:
Official documentation including:

  • Disclaimer
  • Terms of Service
  • Privacy Policy
  • Acceptable Use Policy
  • Data Deletion Policy

docs.title: Our Commitment
docs.text:
Every aspect of Kustomz Mod Shop is designed to deliver a professional customer experience.

From our branding and customer portal to our ticket system and policies, our focus remains the same:

Professional. Organized. Premium. Confident. Trustworthy.

docs.title: Acceptable Use
docs.text: No spam, harassment, exploits, or malicious behavior.

docs.title: Kustomz Bot
docs.text:
The Kustomz Bot is an integral part of the Kustomz Mod Shop customer experience.

Its primary purpose is to support the Discord customer portal through automation, organization, and server management.

docs.title: Responsibilities
docs.text:
The Kustomz Bot supports:

  • Ticket automation
  • Server management
  • Community management
  • Operational efficiency

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text: The Kustomz Bot helps provide a professional, organized, and consistent experience for both customers and staff throughout the service process.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text: Document your slash commands here.

docs.title: Customer Portal
docs.text:
The official Kustomz Mod Shop Discord server serves as the Customer Portal for all mod services.

Customers can:

  • Open private service tickets
  • Communicate directly with staff
  • Receive updates on active requests
  • Stay informed through announcements and public community channels

docs.title: Private Ticket System
docs.text:
Every service request begins with a private ticket.

Only the customer and authorized staff members have access to an active service ticket, ensuring organized and confidential communication throughout the process.

docs.title: Join the Customer Portal
docs.text:
Official Discord Server

https://discord.gg/Gq6junKg5r

docs.title: Data Deletion
docs.text: Users may request deletion of stored data through the support server.

docs.title: No Affiliation
docs.text:
Kustomz Mod Shop is an independent community and service provider.

Kustomz Mod Shop is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or associated with Zynga Inc., NaturalMotion Games Ltd., Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc., or any of their subsidiaries, affiliates, licensors, or partners.

CSR2 (CSR Racing 2) and all related trademarks, logos, game assets, and intellectual property are the property of their respective owners.

References to CSR2 are used solely for identification and informational purposes.

docs.title: Educational & Informational Purpose
docs.text:
The information, documentation, examples, and other materials provided through this website, our Discord server, bot, and services are provided for educational and informational purposes.

Users are solely responsible for how they choose to use any information or services provided by Kustomz Mod Shop.

docs.title: User Responsibility
docs.text:
By using our website, Discord server, bot, or services, you acknowledge that you are responsible for your own actions and any consequences resulting from those actions.

Kustomz Mod Shop accepts no responsibility for account actions, suspensions, restrictions, bans, or other consequences resulting from a user's activities.

docs.title: No Warranty
docs.text: All services, information, and documentation are provided "as is" without warranties or guarantees of any kind, whether express or implied.

docs.title: Changes
docs.text: This Disclaimer may be updated periodically. Continued use of our website or services after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the revised Disclaimer.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.text: Common questions and answers.

docs.title: Features
docs.text: Describe moderation, automation, integrations, leveling, and custom systems.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Invite the bot, grant permissions, and configure your server.

docs.title: Premium Mod Services for CSR2
docs.text:
Kustomz Mod Shop is dedicated to delivering premium mod services for the CSR2 community.

Our commitment is to provide a professional experience built on consistency, organization, and trust.

docs.title: Services
docs.text:
Premium mod services are provided through our official Customer Portal on Discord.

To ensure every request is handled efficiently, all service requests are managed through private support tickets.

docs.title: Professional Experience
docs.text:
Every customer receives:

  • Organized ticket-based service
  • Direct communication with staff
  • A professional and consistent experience
  • Updates throughout the service process

For access to our services, visit the Customer Portal.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text: The bot may store Discord IDs and configuration required for operation. Data is never sold.

docs.title: Support
docs.text: Join the official Kustomz Discord support server.

docs.title: Terms of Service
docs.text: This service is provided as-is. Users must comply with Discord policies and may not abuse the bot.
